description.en: Create or evaluate an architecture decision record (ADR). Use when choosing between technologies (e.g., Kafka vs SQS), documenting a design decision with trade-offs and consequences, reviewing a system design proposal, or designing a new component from requirements and constraints.
description.zh: 创建或评估架构决策记录 (ADR)。适用于在不同技术之间进行选择（例如，Kafka 与 SQS）、记录包含权衡和后果的设计决策、审查系统设计提案，或根据需求和约束设计新组件时使用。

description.en: Review code changes for security, performance, and correctness. Trigger with a PR URL or diff, "review this before I merge", "is this code safe?", or when checking a change for N+1 queries, injection risks, missing edge cases, or error handling gaps.
description.zh: 审查代码更改的安全性、性能和正确性。在提供 PR URL 或差异代码、提到“在我合并之前审查这个”、“这段代码安全吗？”，或检查代码更改是否存在 N+1 查询、注入风险、遗漏边界情况或错误处理漏洞时触发。

description.en: Structured debugging session — reproduce, isolate, diagnose, and fix. Trigger with an error message or stack trace, "this works in staging but not prod", "something broke after the deploy", or when behavior diverges from expected and the cause isn't obvious.
description.zh: 结构化调试会话——复现、隔离、诊断和修复。在提供错误消息或堆栈跟踪、提到“这在预发布环境中有效但在生产环境中无效”、“部署后出现问题”，或当行为与预期出现偏差且原因不明显时触发。

description.en: Pre-deployment verification checklist. Use when about to ship a release, deploying a change with database migrations or feature flags, verifying CI status and approvals before going to production, or documenting rollback triggers ahead of time.
description.zh: 部署前验证检查清单。适用于准备发布版本、部署包含数据库迁移或功能开关的更改、在投入生产之前验证 CI 状态和批准情况，或提前记录回滚触发条件时使用。

description.en: Write and maintain technical documentation. Trigger with "write docs for", "document this", "create a README", "write a runbook", "onboarding guide", or when the user needs help with any form of technical writing — API docs, architecture docs, or operational runbooks.
description.zh: 编写并维护技术文档。在提到“为 [某物] 编写文档”、“记录这个”、“创建一个 README”、“写一份运行手册”、“入职指南”，或用户需要任何形式的技术写作（API 文档、架构文档或操作运行手册）帮助时触发。

description.en: Run an incident response workflow — triage, communicate, and write postmortem. Trigger with "we have an incident", "production is down", an alert that needs severity assessment, a status update mid-incident, or when writing a blameless postmortem after resolution.
description.zh: 运行事故响应工作流——分类、沟通并编写事后分析报告。在提到“我们发生了一起事件”、“生产环境宕机”、需要评估严重性的警报、事件进行中的状态更新，或在解决问题后编写无指责的事后分析报告时触发。

description.en: Generate a standup update from recent activity. Use when preparing for daily standup, summarizing yesterday's commits and PRs and ticket moves, formatting work into yesterday/today/blockers, or structuring a few rough notes into a shareable update.
description.zh: 根据近期活动生成站会更新。适用于准备每日站会、总结昨天的提交、PR 和工单移动、将工作格式化为昨天/今天/阻碍因素，或将一些粗略的笔记结构化为可分享的更新时使用。

description.en: Design systems, services, and architectures. Trigger with "design a system for", "how should we architect", "system design for", "what's the right architecture for", or when the user needs help with API design, data modeling, or service boundaries.
description.zh: 设计系统、服务和架构。在提到“为 [某物] 设计一个系统”、“我们应该如何架构”、“[某物] 的系统设计”、“什么是正确的架构”，或用户需要有关 API 设计、数据建模或服务边界的帮助时触发。

description.en: Identify, categorize, and prioritize technical debt. Trigger with "tech debt", "technical debt audit", "what should we refactor", "code health", or when the user asks about code quality, refactoring priorities, or maintenance backlog.
description.zh: 识别、分类并优先处理技术债务。在提到“技术债务”、“技术债务审计”、“我们应该重构什么”、“代码健康度”，或用户询问有关代码质量、重构优先级或维护待办事项时触发。

description.en: Design test strategies and test plans. Trigger with "how should we test", "test strategy for", "write tests for", "test plan", "what tests do we need", or when the user needs help with testing approaches, coverage, or test architecture.
description.zh: 设计测试策略和测试计划。在提到“我们应该如何测试”、“[某物] 的测试策略”、“为 [某物] 编写测试”、“测试计划”、“我们需要哪些测试”，或用户需要有关测试方法、覆盖率或测试架构的帮助时触发。

tryAsking.en: Review these code changes for correctness and risk
tryAsking.zh: 审查这些代码变更的正确性和风险

tryAsking.en: Create an architecture decision record for this tradeoff
tryAsking.zh: 为这个技术取舍创建架构决策记录

tryAsking.en: Generate a deployment checklist for this release
tryAsking.zh: 为本次发布生成一份部署检查清单

tryAsking.en: Help debug this production error from the logs
tryAsking.zh: 根据日志帮助调试此生产错误

tryAsking.en: Write technical documentation for this module
tryAsking.zh: 为这个模块编写技术文档

tryAsking.en: Create an incident response timeline and action plan
tryAsking.zh: 创建事故响应时间线和行动计划

description.en: Assist with standups, code review, debugging, architecture decisions, incident response, technical docs, and release checks.
description.zh: 辅助站会、代码审查、调试、架构决策、事故响应、技术文档和发布检查。

description.en: Run a WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit on a design or page. Trigger with "audit accessibility", "check a11y", "is this accessible?", or when reviewing a design for color contrast, keyboard navigation, touch target size, or screen reader behavior before handoff.
description.zh: 对设计或页面执行 WCAG 2.1 AA 无障碍审计。在提到“审计无障碍性”、“检查 a11y”、“这具有无障碍性吗？”，或在交接前审查设计的颜色对比度、键盘导航、触摸目标大小或屏幕阅读器行为时触发。

description.en: Get structured design feedback on usability, hierarchy, and consistency. Trigger with "review this design", "critique this mockup", "what do you think of this screen?", or when sharing a Figma link or screenshot for feedback at any stage from exploration to final polish.
description.zh: 从可用性、层级和一致性方面获取结构化的设计反馈。当提到“审查这个设计”、“点评这个模型”、“你觉得这个界面怎么样？”，或者在从探索到最终打磨的任何阶段分享 Figma 链接或截图以获取反馈时触发。

description.en: Generate developer handoff specs from a design. Use when a design is ready for engineering and needs a spec sheet covering layout, design tokens, component props, interaction states, responsive breakpoints, edge cases, and animation details.
description.zh: 从设计稿生成开发交接规范。当设计准备好交付工程开发，需要一份包含布局、设计 token、组件属性、交互状态、响应式断点、边缘情况和动画细节的规范说明时使用。

description.en: Audit, document, or extend your design system. Use when checking for naming inconsistencies or hardcoded values across components, writing documentation for a component's variants, states, and accessibility notes, or designing a new pattern that fits the existing system.
description.zh: 审查、记录或扩展您的设计系统。在检查组件间的命名不一致或硬编码值、为组件的变体、状态和无障碍说明编写文档，或设计符合现有系统的新模式时使用。

description.en: Synthesize user research into themes, insights, and recommendations. Use when you have interview transcripts, survey results, usability test notes, support tickets, or NPS responses that need to be distilled into patterns, user segments, and prioritized next steps.
description.zh: 将用户研究综合提炼为主题、洞察和建议。当您有需要提取成模式、用户细分和优先下一步行动的访谈记录、调查结果、可用性测试笔记、支持工单或 NPS 反馈时使用。

description.en: Plan, conduct, and synthesize user research. Trigger with "user research plan", "interview guide", "usability test", "survey design", "research questions", or when the user needs help with any aspect of understanding their users through research.
description.zh: 规划、执行并综合用户研究。当提到“用户研究计划”、“访谈指南”、“可用性测试”、“问卷设计”、“研究问题”，或当用户需要通过研究了解其用户的任何方面帮助时触发。

description.en: Write or review UX copy — microcopy, error messages, empty states, CTAs. Trigger with "write copy for", "what should this button say?", "review this error message", or when naming a CTA, wording a confirmation dialog, filling an empty state, or writing onboarding text.
description.zh: 撰写或审查 UX 文案——微文案、错误提示、空状态、CTA。当提到“为...写文案”、“这个按钮应该怎么写？”、“审查这个错误提示”，或者在为 CTA 命名、斟酌确认弹窗措辞、填充空状态或撰写引导文本时触发。

tryAsking.en: Give structured feedback on this product design
tryAsking.zh: 对这个产品设计给出结构化反馈

tryAsking.en: Audit our design system for consistency gaps
tryAsking.zh: 审查我们的设计系统是否存在一致性缺口

tryAsking.en: Prepare developer handoff notes for this screen
tryAsking.zh: 为这个界面准备开发交接说明

tryAsking.en: Run an accessibility review for this flow
tryAsking.zh: 对这个流程做无障碍审查

tryAsking.en: Write UX copy for these empty and error states
tryAsking.zh: 为这些空状态和错误状态编写 UX 文案

tryAsking.en: Synthesize these user research notes into design insights
tryAsking.zh: 将这些用户研究记录综合成设计洞察

description.en: Support design critique, design systems, UX copy, accessibility review, user research synthesis, and developer handoff.
description.zh: 支持设计评审、设计系统、UX 文案、无障碍审查、用户研究综合分析以及开发人员交接。

description.en: Plan resource capacity — workload analysis and utilization forecasting. Use when heading into quarterly planning, the team feels overallocated and you need the numbers, deciding whether to hire or deprioritize, or stress-testing whether upcoming projects fit the people you have.
description.zh: 规划资源容量——工作量分析和利用率预测。在进入季度规划、团队感觉工作超载需要数据支持、决定是否招聘或降级优先级，或压力测试即将到来的项目是否与现有人员匹配时使用。

description.en: Create a change management request with impact analysis and rollback plan. Use when proposing a system or process change that needs approval, preparing a change record for CAB review, documenting risk and rollback steps before a deployment, or planning stakeholder communications for a rollout.
description.zh: 创建包含影响分析和回滚计划的变更管理请求。在提议需要审批的系统或流程变更、准备 CAB 审查的变更记录、在部署前记录风险和回滚步骤，或为发布规划干系人沟通时使用。

description.en: Track compliance requirements and audit readiness. Trigger with "compliance", "audit prep", "SOC 2", "ISO 27001", "GDPR", "regulatory requirement", or when the user needs help tracking, preparing for, or documenting compliance activities.
description.zh: 跟踪合规要求和审计准备情况。当提到“合规”、“审计准备”、“SOC 2”、“ISO 27001”、“GDPR”、“监管要求”，或者当用户需要帮助跟踪、准备或记录合规活动时触发。

description.en: Document a business process — flowcharts, RACI, and SOPs. Use when formalizing a process that lives in someone's head, building a RACI to clarify who owns what, writing an SOP for a handoff or audit, or capturing the exceptions and edge cases of how work actually gets done.
description.zh: 记录业务流程——流程图、RACI 和 SOP。在将某人脑海中的流程规范化、建立 RACI 以明确责任人、为交接或审计编写 SOP，或记录实际工作中的异常和边缘情况时使用。

description.en: Analyze and improve business processes. Trigger with "this process is slow", "how can we improve", "streamline this workflow", "too many steps", "bottleneck", or when the user describes an inefficient process they want to fix.
description.zh: 分析并改善业务流程。当提到“这个流程很慢”、“我们如何改进”、“精简这个工作流”、“步骤太多”、“瓶颈”，或者当用户描述他们想要修复的低效流程时触发。

description.en: Identify, assess, and mitigate operational risks. Trigger with "what are the risks", "risk assessment", "risk register", "what could go wrong", or when the user is evaluating risks associated with a project, vendor, process, or decision.
description.zh: 识别、评估并缓解运营风险。当提到“有哪些风险”、“风险评估”、“风险登记册”、“可能会出什么问题”，或者当用户正在评估与项目、供应商、流程或决策相关的风险时触发。

description.en: Create or update an operational runbook for a recurring task or procedure. Use when documenting a task that on-call or ops needs to run repeatably, turning tribal knowledge into exact step-by-step commands, adding troubleshooting and rollback steps to an existing procedure, or writing escalation paths for when things go wrong.
description.zh: 为日常任务或程序创建或更新操作运行手册。在记录值班或运维人员需要重复执行的任务、将团队经验转化为精确的逐步命令、为现有程序添加排障和回滚步骤，或编写出现问题时的升级路径时使用。

description.en: Generate a status report with KPIs, risks, and action items. Use when writing a weekly or monthly update for leadership, summarizing project health with green/yellow/red status, surfacing risks and decisions that need stakeholder attention, or turning a pile of project tracker activity into a readable narrative.
description.zh: 生成包含 KPI、风险和行动项的状态报告。在为领导层撰写周报或月报、用红黄绿状态总结项目健康状况、暴露需要干系人关注的风险和决策，或将一堆项目跟踪活动转化为可读叙述时使用。

description.en: Evaluate a vendor — cost analysis, risk assessment, and recommendation. Use when reviewing a new vendor proposal, deciding whether to renew or replace a contract, comparing two vendors side-by-side, or building a TCO breakdown and negotiation points before procurement sign-off.
description.zh: 评估供应商——成本分析、风险评估和建议。在审查新的供应商提案、决定是否续签或更换合同、横向对比两个供应商，或在采购签字前构建 TCO 明细和谈判要点时使用。

tryAsking.en: Create a runbook for this monthly process
tryAsking.zh: 为这个月度流程创建运行手册

tryAsking.en: Evaluate this vendor with cost and risk analysis
tryAsking.zh: 从成本和风险角度评估这个供应商

tryAsking.en: Draft a change request with rollback steps
tryAsking.zh: 起草包含回滚步骤的变更请求

tryAsking.en: Document this process with owners and handoffs
tryAsking.zh: 记录这个流程的负责人和交接点

tryAsking.en: Build a capacity plan for next quarter
tryAsking.zh: 制定下季度容量规划

tryAsking.en: Create a compliance tracking report
tryAsking.zh: 创建合规跟踪报告

description.en: Handle vendor review, process documentation, change requests, capacity planning, compliance tracking, and runbooks.
description.zh: 处理供应商评估、流程文档、变更请求、容量规划、合规跟踪和运行手册。

description.en: Create a competitive analysis brief for one or more competitors or a feature area. Use when informing product strategy or feature prioritization, building sales battle cards, prepping board or investor materials, or deciding where to differentiate vs. achieve parity.
description.zh: 创建针对一个或多个竞争对手或功能领域的竞品分析简报。在为产品战略或功能优先级提供信息、构建销售对战卡、准备董事会或投资者材料，或决定在哪些方面实现差异化与保持同等水平时使用。

description.en: Review and analyze product metrics with trend analysis and actionable insights. Use when running a weekly, monthly, or quarterly metrics review, investigating a sudden spike or drop, comparing performance against targets, or turning raw numbers into a scorecard with recommended actions.
description.zh: 通过趋势分析和可操作的洞察来审查和分析产品指标。在进行每周、每月或每季度的指标审查、调查突发激增或下降、对比目标评估表现，或将原始数据转化为带有建议行动的计分卡时使用。

description.en: Brainstorm product ideas, explore problem spaces, and challenge assumptions as a thinking partner. Use when exploring a new opportunity, generating solutions to a product problem, stress-testing an idea, or when a PM needs to think out loud with a sharp sparring partner before converging on a direction.
description.zh: 作为产品思考伙伴，帮助产品经理发散创意、拆解问题、挑战假设，并在确定方向前进行思路碰撞。适用于新机会探索、方案生成、想法验证和产品决策前的深度讨论。

description.en: Update, create, or reprioritize your product roadmap. Use when adding a new initiative and deciding what moves to make room, shifting priorities after new information comes in, moving timelines due to a dependency slip, or building a Now/Next/Later view from scratch.
description.zh: 更新、创建或重新确定产品路线图的优先级。在添加新举措并决定腾出空间、获取新信息后调整优先级、由于依赖项延期而推迟时间表，或从头构建 Now/Next/Later 视图时使用。

description.en: Plan a sprint — scope work, estimate capacity, set goals, and draft a sprint plan. Use when kicking off a new sprint, sizing a backlog against team availability (accounting for PTO and meetings), deciding what's P0 vs. stretch, or handling carryover from the last sprint.
description.zh: 规划 sprint —— 划定工作范围、评估容量、设定目标并起草 sprint 计划。在启动新 sprint、根据团队可用性（考虑 PTO 和会议）评估待办事项大小、决定哪些是 P0 哪些是延伸目标，或处理上个 sprint 的遗留工作时使用。

description.en: Generate a stakeholder update tailored to audience and cadence. Use when writing a weekly or monthly status for leadership, announcing a launch, escalating a risk or blocker, or translating the same progress into exec-brief, engineering-detail, or customer-facing versions.
description.zh: 根据不同对象和沟通场景，生成合适的项目进展同步内容。适用于管理层周报/月报、上线公告、风险与阻塞问题上报，也可将同一份进展改写为高管摘要、工程说明或客户沟通版本。

description.en: Synthesize user research from interviews, surveys, and feedback into structured insights. Use when you have a pile of interview notes, survey responses, or support tickets to make sense of, need to extract themes and rank findings by frequency and impact, or want to turn raw feedback into roadmap recommendations.
description.zh: 将来自访谈、调查和反馈的用户研究综合提炼为结构化洞察。当您有一堆访谈笔记、调查问卷或支持工单需要理清头绪，需要提取主题并按频率和影响对发现进行排序，或希望将原始反馈转化为路线图建议时使用。

description.en: Write a feature spec or PRD from a problem statement or feature idea. Use when turning a vague idea or user request into a structured document, scoping a feature with goals and non-goals, defining success metrics and acceptance criteria, or breaking a big ask into a phased spec.
description.zh: 根据问题陈述或功能想法编写功能规范或 PRD。在将模糊想法或用户请求转化为结构化文档、通过目标和非目标划定功能范围、定义成功指标和验收标准，或将庞大需求拆分为分阶段规范时使用。

tryAsking.en: Write a feature spec for enterprise SSO
tryAsking.zh: 为企业 SSO 编写功能规格

tryAsking.en: Update the roadmap based on these new constraints
tryAsking.zh: 根据这些新约束更新路线图

tryAsking.en: Synthesize these interview notes into product insights
tryAsking.zh: 将这些访谈记录综合成产品洞察

tryAsking.en: Create a weekly stakeholder update for executives
tryAsking.zh: 生成面向管理层的每周进展汇报

tryAsking.en: Compare our onboarding flow against competitors
tryAsking.zh: 将我们的引导流程与竞品对比

tryAsking.en: Review product metrics and recommend priorities
tryAsking.zh: 复盘产品指标并建议优先级

description.en: Cover PM workflows including specs, roadmaps, stakeholder updates, user research synthesis, competitive briefs, and metrics review.
description.zh: 覆盖产品经理的核心工作流，包括需求文档、产品路线图、相关方同步、用户研究总结、竞品分析和数据复盘。

description.en: Analyze compensation — benchmarking, band placement, and equity modeling. Trigger with "what should we pay a [role]", "is this offer competitive", "model this equity grant", or when uploading comp data to find outliers and retention risks.
description.zh: 分析薪酬——包含基准测试、职级区间定位和股权建模。在提到“我们应该给 [职位] 多少薪水”、“这个录用条件有竞争力吗”、“对这份股权授予进行建模”，或上传薪酬数据以寻找异常值和人员流失风险时触发。

description.en: Draft an offer letter with comp details and terms. Use when a candidate is ready for an offer, assembling a total comp package (base, equity, signing bonus), writing the offer letter text itself, or prepping negotiation guidance for the hiring manager.
description.zh: 起草包含薪酬详情和条款的录用通知书。适用于候选人准备好接受录用、组合整体薪酬包（基本工资、股权、签约奖金）、撰写录用通知书正文，或为招聘经理准备谈判指导时使用。

description.en: Create structured interview plans with competency-based questions and scorecards. Trigger with "interview plan for", "interview questions for", "how should we interview", "scorecard for", or when the user is preparing to interview candidates.
description.zh: 创建包含基于能力的提问和评分卡的结构化面试计划。在提到“[职位] 的面试计划”、“[职位] 的面试问题”、“我们应该如何面试”、“[职位] 的评分卡”，或用户准备面试候选人时触发。

description.en: Generate an onboarding checklist and first-week plan for a new hire. Use when someone has a start date coming up, building the pre-start task list (accounts, equipment, buddy), scheduling Day 1 and Week 1, or setting 30/60/90-day goals for a new team member.
description.zh: 为新员工生成入职清单和第一周计划。适用于某人即将入职、构建入职前任务列表（账号、设备、指导伙伴）、安排第一天和第一周日程，或为新团队成员设定 30/60/90 天目标时使用。

description.en: Headcount planning, org design, and team structure optimization. Trigger with "org planning", "headcount plan", "team structure", "reorg", "who should we hire next", or when the user is thinking about team size, reporting structure, or organizational design.
description.zh: 编制规划、组织设计和团队结构优化。在提到“组织规划”、“编制计划”、“团队结构”、“重组”、“我们接下来应该雇佣谁”，或用户思考团队规模、汇报结构或组织设计时触发。

description.en: Generate headcount, attrition, diversity, or org health reports. Use when pulling a headcount snapshot for leadership, analyzing turnover trends by team, preparing diversity representation metrics, or assessing span of control and flight risk across the org.
description.zh: 生成人员编制、流失率、多元化或组织健康状况报告。适用于为领导层提取人员编制快照、按团队分析人员流失趋势、准备多元化代表性指标，或评估整个组织的管理跨度和离职风险时使用。

description.en: Structure a performance review with self-assessment, manager template, and calibration prep. Use when review season kicks off and you need a self-assessment template, writing a manager review for a direct report, prepping rating distributions and promotion cases for calibration, or turning vague feedback into specific behavioral examples.
description.zh: 构建包含自我评估、经理模板和校准准备的绩效评估结构。适用于评估季开始时需要自我评估模板、为直接下属撰写经理评估、为校准准备评级分布和晋升案例，或将模糊的反馈转化为具体的行为示例时使用。

description.en: Find and explain company policies in plain language. Trigger with "what's our PTO policy", "can I work remotely from another country", "how do expenses work", or any plain-language question about benefits, travel, leave, or handbook rules.
description.zh: 查找并用通俗语言解释公司政策。在提到“我们的带薪休假政策是什么”、“我可以在另一个国家远程工作吗”、“报销流程是怎样的”，或任何关于福利、差旅、休假或员工手册规则的通俗提问时触发。

description.en: Track and manage recruiting pipeline stages. Trigger with "recruiting update", "candidate pipeline", "how many candidates", "hiring status", or when the user discusses sourcing, screening, interviewing, or extending offers.
description.zh: 跟踪和管理招聘漏斗阶段。在提到“招聘更新”、“候选人漏斗”、“有多少候选人”、“招聘状态”，或用户讨论寻源、筛选、面试或发放录用通知时触发。

tryAsking.en: Draft an offer letter for this candidate
tryAsking.zh: 为此候选人起草一份录用通知书

tryAsking.en: Create a first-week onboarding plan for a new hire
tryAsking.zh: 为新员工创建第一周的入职计划

tryAsking.en: Summarize the risks in this performance review
tryAsking.zh: 总结这份绩效评估中的风险点

tryAsking.en: Prepare interview questions for this role
tryAsking.zh: 为这个岗位准备面试问题

tryAsking.en: Analyze compensation bands for this team
tryAsking.zh: 分析这个团队的薪酬区间

tryAsking.en: Create a recruiting pipeline status report
tryAsking.zh: 创建一份招聘漏斗状态报告

description.en: Help with recruiting, onboarding, performance reviews, policy lookup, compensation analysis, and people reporting.
description.zh: 协助招聘、入职、绩效评估、政策查询、薪酬分析和人力数据汇报。

description.en: Review content against your brand voice, style guide, and messaging pillars, flagging deviations by severity with specific before/after fixes. Use when checking a draft before it ships, when auditing copy for voice consistency and terminology, or when screening for unsubstantiated claims, missing disclaimers, and other legal flags.
description.zh: 对照您的品牌调性、风格指南和核心信息支柱审查内容，按严重程度标记偏差，并提供具体的修改前后建议。适用于在发布前审查草稿、审计文案的语调一致性和术语，或筛查无根据的声明、遗漏的免责声明及其他法律风险。

description.en: Generate a full campaign brief with objectives, audience, messaging, channel strategy, content calendar, and success metrics. Use when planning a product launch, lead-gen push, or awareness campaign, when you need a week-by-week content calendar with dependencies, or when translating a marketing goal into a structured, executable plan.
description.zh: 生成完整的营销活动简报，涵盖目标、受众、核心信息、渠道策略、内容日历和成功指标。适用于规划产品发布、线索生成或品牌认知活动，需要包含依赖关系的逐周内容日历，或将营销目标转化为结构化可执行计划时使用。

description.en: Research competitors and generate a positioning and messaging comparison with content gaps, opportunities, and threats. Use when building sales battlecards, when finding positioning gaps and messaging angles competitors haven't claimed, or when a competitor makes a move and you need to assess the impact.
description.zh: 研究竞争对手并生成定位与信息的对比分析，包含内容缺口、机会和威胁。适用于制作销售战卡、寻找竞争对手尚未占据的定位空白和宣传角度，或在竞争对手采取行动时评估其影响。

description.en: Draft marketing content across channels — blog posts, social media, email newsletters, landing pages, press releases, and case studies. Use when writing any marketing content, when you need channel-specific formatting, SEO-optimized copy, headline options, or calls to action.
description.zh: 起草跨渠道营销内容，包括博客文章、社交媒体、电子邮件简报、落地页、新闻稿和案例研究。适用于撰写任何营销内容，需要特定渠道的格式、SEO 优化文案、标题选项或行动号召时使用。

description.en: Draft blog posts, social media, email newsletters, landing pages, press releases, and case studies with channel-specific formatting and SEO recommendations. Use when writing any marketing content, when you need headline or subject line options, or when adapting a message for a specific platform, audience, and brand voice.
description.zh: 起草博客文章、社交媒体、电子邮件简报、落地页、新闻稿和案例研究，并提供特定渠道的格式和 SEO 建议。适用于撰写任何营销内容，需要标题或主题行选项，或需要根据特定平台、受众和品牌语调调整信息时使用。

description.en: Design and draft multi-email sequences with full copy, timing, branching logic, exit conditions, and performance benchmarks. Use when building onboarding, lead nurture, re-engagement, win-back, or product launch flows, when you need a complete drip campaign with A/B test suggestions, or when mapping a sequence end-to-end with a flow diagram.
description.zh: 设计并起草多封电子邮件序列，包含完整文案、发送时间、分支逻辑、退出条件和绩效基准。适用于构建新手引导、线索培育、重新唤醒、赢回或产品发布流程，需要带有 A/B 测试建议的完整滴漏营销活动，或需要用流程图映射端到端序列时使用。

description.en: Build a marketing performance report with key metrics, trend analysis, wins and misses, and prioritized optimization recommendations. Use when wrapping a campaign, when preparing weekly, monthly, or quarterly channel summaries for stakeholders, or when you need data translated into an executive summary with next-period priorities.
description.zh: 构建营销绩效报告，包含关键指标、趋势分析、成败得失以及按优先级排序的优化建议。适用于营销活动复盘、为利益相关者准备每周、每月或季度的渠道总结，或需要将数据转化为带有下期优先事项的高管摘要时使用。

description.en: Run a comprehensive SEO audit — keyword research, on-page analysis, content gaps, technical checks, and competitor comparison. Use when assessing a site's SEO health, when finding keyword opportunities and content gaps competitors own, or when you need a prioritized action plan split into quick wins and strategic investments.
description.zh: 执行全面的 SEO 审计——包括关键词研究、页面分析、内容缺口、技术检查和竞品对比。适用于评估网站的 SEO 健康状况、寻找竞争对手拥有的关键词机会和内容缺口，或需要将行动计划按优先级拆分为速赢项目和战略投资时使用。

tryAsking.en: Draft a launch campaign plan for our new product
tryAsking.zh: 为我们的新产品制定发布营销计划

tryAsking.en: Review this landing page copy against our brand voice
tryAsking.zh: 根据品牌调性审查这段落地页文案

tryAsking.en: Create a performance report from these campaign metrics
tryAsking.zh: 根据这些活动指标生成绩效报告

tryAsking.en: Research competitors and create a positioning brief
tryAsking.zh: 研究竞品并生成定位简报

tryAsking.en: Run an SEO audit and identify content gaps
tryAsking.zh: 执行 SEO 审计并找出内容缺口

tryAsking.en: Design a multi-email onboarding sequence
tryAsking.zh: 设计多封邮件的新用户引导序列

description.en: Create content, plan campaigns, review brand fit, analyze competitors, audit SEO, and report on marketing performance.
description.zh: 用于内容创作、活动规划、品牌审查、竞品分析、SEO 审计和营销绩效报告。

description.en: Support SOX 404 compliance with control testing methodology, sample selection, and documentation standards. Use when generating testing workpapers, selecting audit samples, classifying control deficiencies, or preparing for internal or external audits.
description.zh: 通过控制测试方法、样本选取和文档标准支持 SOX 404 合规。适用于生成测试工作底稿、选取审计样本、对控制缺陷进行分类，或为内部或外部审计做准备。

description.en: Manage the month-end close process with task sequencing, dependencies, and status tracking. Use when planning the close calendar, tracking close progress, identifying blockers, or sequencing close activities by day.
description.zh: 通过任务排序、依赖关系和状态跟踪来管理月末结账流程。适用于规划结账日历、跟踪结账进度、识别阻碍因素，或按天对结账活动进行排序。

description.en: Generate financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) with period-over-period comparison and variance analysis. Use when preparing a monthly or quarterly P&L, closing the books and need to flag material variances, comparing actuals to budget, building a financial summary for leadership review, or looking up GAAP presentation requirements and period-end adjustments.
description.zh: 生成财务报表（损益表、资产负债表、现金流量表），并提供期间对比和差异分析。适用于准备月度或季度损益表、结账并需标记重大差异、将实际情况与预算进行比较、构建供领导层审查的财务摘要，或查找 GAAP 列报要求和期末调整。

description.en: Prepare journal entries with proper debits, credits, and supporting detail. Use when booking month-end accruals (AP, payroll, prepaid), recording depreciation or amortization, posting revenue recognition or deferred revenue adjustments, or documenting an entry for audit review.
description.zh: 准备包含正确的借方、贷方及支持细节的会计分录。适用于记录月末应计项目（应付账款、薪酬、预付）、记录折旧或摊销、过账收入确认或递延收入调整，或记录供审计审查的分录。

description.en: Prepare journal entries with proper debits, credits, and supporting documentation for month-end close. Use when booking accruals, prepaid amortization, fixed asset depreciation, payroll entries, revenue recognition, or any manual journal entry.
description.zh: 为月末结账准备包含正确的借方、贷方及支持文档的会计分录。适用于记录应计项目、预付摊销、固定资产折旧、薪酬分录、收入确认或任何手工会计分录。

description.en: Reconcile accounts by comparing GL balances to subledgers, bank statements, or third-party data. Use when performing bank reconciliations, GL-to-subledger recs, intercompany reconciliations, or identifying and categorizing reconciling items.
description.zh: 通过将总账余额与明细分类账、银行对账单或第三方数据进行比较来进行账户核对。适用于执行银行对账、总账与明细分类账对账、公司间对账，或识别和分类调节项目。

description.en: Generate SOX sample selections, testing workpapers, and control assessments. Use when planning quarterly or annual SOX 404 testing, pulling a sample for a control (revenue, P2P, ITGC, close), building a testing workpaper template, or evaluating and classifying a control deficiency.
description.zh: 生成 SOX 样本选取、测试工作底稿和控制评估。适用于规划季度或年度 SOX 404 测试、为某项控制（收入、P2P、ITGC、结账）提取样本、构建测试工作底稿模板，或评估并分类控制缺陷。

description.en: Decompose financial variances into drivers with narrative explanations and waterfall analysis. Use when analyzing budget vs. actual, period-over-period changes, revenue or expense variances, or preparing variance commentary for leadership.
description.zh: 将财务差异分解为驱动因素，并提供文字解释和瀑布图分析。适用于分析预算与实际的对比、期间环比或同比变化、收入或支出差异，或为领导层准备差异说明。

tryAsking.en: Prepare month-end journal entries for these accruals
tryAsking.zh: 为这些应计项目准备月末会计分录

tryAsking.en: Reconcile this account against the general ledger
tryAsking.zh: 将此账户与总账进行核对

tryAsking.en: Explain the main drivers behind this revenue variance
tryAsking.zh: 解释该收入差异背后的主要驱动因素

tryAsking.en: Generate a close checklist for this reporting period
tryAsking.zh: 为当前报告期生成结账检查清单

tryAsking.en: Prepare SOX testing workpapers for this control
tryAsking.zh: 为该项控制准备 SOX 测试工作底稿

tryAsking.en: Draft financial statement notes from these schedules
tryAsking.zh: 根据这些明细表起草财务报表附注

description.en: Support close management, journal entries, reconciliation, financial statements, variance analysis, and audit prep.
description.zh: 支持结账管理、会计分录、对账、财务报表、差异分析和审计准备。

description.en: Research a company or person and get actionable sales intel. Works standalone with web search, supercharged when you connect enrichment tools or your CRM. Trigger with "research [company]", "look up [person]", "intel on [prospect]", "who is [name] at [company]", or "tell me about [company]".
description.zh: 研究一家公司或个人并获取可执行的销售情报。可以通过网页搜索独立运作，当连接数据丰富工具或您的 CRM 时效果倍增。触发条件为“研究 [公司]”、“查找 [人员]”、“关于 [潜在客户] 的情报”、“[公司] 的 [姓名] 是谁”或“告诉我关于 [公司] 的信息”。

description.en: Prepare for a sales call with account context, attendee research, and suggested agenda. Works standalone with user input and web research, supercharged when you connect your CRM, email, chat, or transcripts. Trigger with "prep me for my call with [company]", "I'm meeting with [company] prep me", "call prep [company]", or "get me ready for [meeting]".
description.zh: 结合客户背景、参会人信息和建议议程，帮你快速完成销售会前准备。可基于用户输入和网络调研独立工作；连接 CRM、邮件、聊天记录或会议转写后，可生成更完整的准备材料。

description.en: Process call notes or a transcript — extract action items, draft follow-up email, generate internal summary. Use when pasting rough notes or a transcript after a discovery, demo, or negotiation call, drafting a customer follow-up, logging the activity for your CRM, or capturing objections and next steps for your team.
description.zh: 处理客户沟通记录或会议转写，提取行动项，起草后续跟进邮件，并生成内部摘要。适用于在需求挖掘、产品演示或商务谈判后整理会议记录、撰写客户跟进内容、同步 CRM 活动，或为团队沉淀客户异议和下一步计划。

description.en: Research your competitors and build an interactive battlecard. Outputs an HTML artifact with clickable competitor cards and a comparison matrix. Trigger with "competitive intel", "research competitors", "how do we compare to [competitor]", "battlecard for [competitor]", or "what's new with [competitor]".
description.zh: 调研竞争对手，并生成可交互的竞品应对卡。输出包含可点击竞品卡片和对比矩阵的 HTML 页面。可通过“竞品情报”、“调研竞品”、“我们和 [竞品] 相比怎么样”、“生成 [竞品] 的竞品应对卡”或“[竞品] 最近有什么新动态”触发。

description.en: Generate tailored sales assets (landing pages, decks, one-pagers, workflow demos) from your deal context. Describe your prospect, audience, and goal — get a polished, branded asset ready to share with customers.
description.zh: 根据商机背景生成定制化销售物料，包括落地页、演示文稿、一页纸资料和工作流演示。描述你的潜在客户、目标受众和沟通目标，即可生成可直接分享给客户的品牌化物料。

description.en: Start your day with a prioritized sales briefing. Works standalone when you tell me your meetings and priorities, supercharged when you connect your calendar, CRM, and email. Trigger with "morning briefing", "daily brief", "what's on my plate today", "prep my day", or "start my day".
description.zh: 生成按优先级整理的每日销售简报。你可以直接提供当天会议和重点事项；连接日历、CRM 和邮件后，可自动汇总更完整的客户与任务信息。可通过“早间简报”、“每日简报”、“我今天有哪些重点事项”、“帮我准备今天的工作”或“开始我的一天”触发。

description.en: Research a prospect then draft personalized outreach. Uses web research by default, supercharged with enrichment and CRM. Trigger with "draft outreach to [person/company]", "write cold email to [prospect]", "reach out to [name]".
description.zh: 调研潜在客户，并起草个性化触达邮件或消息。默认基于网络信息进行调研；结合客户画像补全和 CRM 数据后，可生成更精准的触达内容。可通过“给 [个人/公司] 写触达邮件”、“给 [潜在客户] 写开发信”或“联系 [姓名]”触发。

description.en: Generate a weighted sales forecast with best/likely/worst scenarios, commit vs. upside breakdown, and gap analysis. Use when preparing a quarterly forecast call, assessing gap-to-quota from a pipeline CSV, deciding which deals to commit vs. call upside, or checking pipeline coverage against your number.
description.zh: 生成加权销售预测，包含最佳、可能和最差场景，拆分确定性收入与潜在增量，并进行目标缺口分析。适用于准备季度销售预测会议、基于销售漏斗 CSV 评估目标差距、判断哪些商机可计入承诺目标或潜在增量，或检查当前销售漏斗是否足以支撑业绩目标。

description.en: Analyze pipeline health — prioritize deals, flag risks, get a weekly action plan. Use when running a weekly pipeline review, deciding which deals to focus on this week, spotting stale or stuck opportunities, auditing for hygiene issues like bad close dates, or identifying single-threaded deals.
description.zh: 分析销售漏斗健康度，识别高优先级商机和潜在风险，并生成本周行动计划。适用于每周销售漏斗复盘、判断本周应重点推进哪些商机、发现停滞或推进受阻的机会、检查预计成交时间等数据质量问题，或识别过度依赖单一联系人的商机。

tryAsking.en: Prepare me for a call with this account
tryAsking.zh: 帮我准备与这个客户的通话

tryAsking.en: Draft a personalized outbound email for this prospect
tryAsking.zh: 为这个潜在客户起草个性化触达邮件

tryAsking.en: Review my pipeline and flag the biggest risks
tryAsking.zh: 复盘我的销售漏斗，并指出最大的风险

tryAsking.en: Summarize this sales call and draft follow-up
tryAsking.zh: 总结这次销售沟通，并起草后续跟进内容

tryAsking.en: Build a competitive battlecard for this deal
tryAsking.zh: 为这个商机生成竞品应对卡

tryAsking.en: Generate a weighted forecast from this pipeline
tryAsking.zh: 基于这个销售漏斗生成加权预测

description.en: Help with account research, call prep, call summaries, outreach drafting, pipeline review, forecasting, and sales assets.
description.zh: 辅助销售团队完成客户研究、会前准备、会议纪要、客户触达文案、销售漏斗复盘、业绩预测和销售物料整理。

description.en: Answer data questions -- from quick lookups to full analyses. Use when looking up a single metric, investigating what's driving a trend or drop, comparing segments over time, or preparing a formal data report for stakeholders.
description.zh: 回答各类数据问题，从快速查询单个指标到完整数据分析。适用于查询某个指标、分析趋势变化或下跌原因、按时间对比不同细分群体，或为相关方准备正式数据报告。

description.en: Build an interactive HTML dashboard with charts, filters, and tables. Use when creating an executive overview with KPI cards, turning query results into a shareable self-contained report, building a team monitoring snapshot, or needing multiple charts with filters in one browser-openable file.
description.zh: 构建包含图表、筛选器和表格的交互式 HTML 数据看板。适用于创建带 KPI 卡片的管理层概览、将查询结果转成可分享的独立报告、搭建团队监控快照，或在一个可用浏览器打开的文件中展示多个带筛选条件的图表。

description.en: Create publication-quality visualizations with Python. Use when turning query results or a DataFrame into a chart, selecting the right chart type for a trend or comparison, generating a plot for a report or presentation, or needing an interactive chart with hover and zoom.
description.zh: 使用 Python 创建可用于正式发布的高质量可视化图表。适用于将查询结果或 DataFrame 转成图表、为趋势或对比场景选择合适图表类型、生成报告或演示文稿中的图形，或创建支持悬停和缩放的交互式图表。

description.en:
Generate or improve a company-specific data analysis skill by extracting tribal knowledge from analysts.
BOOTSTRAP MODE - Triggers: "Create a data context skill", "Set up data analysis for our warehouse", "Help me create a skill for our database", "Generate a data skill for [company]" → Discovers schemas, asks key questions, generates initial skill with reference files
ITERATION MODE - Triggers: "Add context about [domain]", "The skill needs more info about [topic]", "Update the data skill with [metrics/tables/terminology]", "Improve the [domain] reference" → Loads existing skill, asks targeted questions, appends/updates reference files
Use when data analysts want Claude to understand their company's specific data warehouse, terminology, metrics definitions, and common query patterns.
description.zh: 通过提取分析师的经验知识，生成或改进公司专属的数据分析技能。

description.en: Create effective data visualizations with Python (matplotlib, seaborn, plotly). Use when building charts, choosing the right chart type for a dataset, creating publication-quality figures, or applying design principles like accessibility and color theory.
description.zh: 使用 Python（matplotlib、seaborn、plotly）创建有效的数据可视化。适用于构建图表、为数据集选择合适图表类型、创建可用于正式发布的高质量图形，或应用无障碍、色彩理论等设计原则。

description.en: Profile and explore a dataset to understand its shape, quality, and patterns. Use when encountering a new table or file, checking null rates and column distributions, spotting data quality issues like duplicates or suspicious values, or deciding which dimensions and metrics to analyze.
description.zh: 对数据集进行画像和探索，了解其结构、质量和模式。适用于首次接触一张新表或新文件、检查空值率和字段分布、发现重复值或可疑值等数据质量问题，或判断应该分析哪些维度和指标。

description.en: Write correct, performant SQL across all major data warehouse dialects (Snowflake, BigQuery, Databricks, PostgreSQL, etc.). Use when writing queries, optimizing slow SQL, translating between dialects, or building complex analytical queries with CTEs, window functions, or aggregations.
description.zh: 为主流数据仓库方言编写正确且高性能的 SQL，包括 Snowflake、BigQuery、Databricks、PostgreSQL 等。适用于编写查询、优化慢 SQL、在不同 SQL 方言之间转换，或使用 CTE、窗口函数、聚合等构建复杂分析查询。

description.en: Apply statistical methods including descriptive stats, trend analysis, outlier detection, and hypothesis testing. Use when analyzing distributions, testing for significance, detecting anomalies, computing correlations, or interpreting statistical results.
description.zh: 应用统计方法，包括描述统计、趋势分析、异常值检测和假设检验。适用于分析数据分布、检验显著性、检测异常、计算相关性，或解读统计分析结果。

description.en: QA an analysis before sharing -- methodology, accuracy, and bias checks. Use when reviewing an analysis before a stakeholder presentation, spot-checking calculations and aggregation logic, verifying a SQL query's results look right, or assessing whether conclusions are actually supported by the data.
description.zh: 在分享前对分析结果进行 QA，检查方法、准确性和潜在偏差。适用于在面向相关方汇报前审查分析、抽查计算和聚合逻辑、验证 SQL 查询结果是否合理，或评估结论是否真正有数据支撑。

description.en: Write optimized SQL for your dialect with best practices. Use when translating a natural-language data need into SQL, building a multi-CTE query with joins and aggregations, optimizing a query against a large partitioned table, or getting dialect-specific syntax for Snowflake, BigQuery, Postgres, etc.
description.zh: 按照你的数据仓库方言和最佳实践编写优化后的 SQL。适用于将自然语言数据需求转成 SQL、构建包含多层 CTE、表连接和聚合的复杂查询、针对大型分区表优化查询，或获取 Snowflake、BigQuery、Postgres 等数据库的方言语法。

tryAsking.en: Write a cohort retention SQL query
tryAsking.zh: 编写同期群留存分析 SQL

tryAsking.en: Explore this table for data quality issues
tryAsking.zh: 检查这张表的数据质量问题

tryAsking.en: Build a dashboard outline for these KPIs
tryAsking.zh: 为这些 KPI 设计仪表盘结构

tryAsking.en: Validate this analysis before I share it
tryAsking.zh: 在我分享前验证这份分析

tryAsking.en: Create a visualization for monthly revenue trends
tryAsking.zh: 创建月度收入趋势图

tryAsking.en: Run a statistical analysis on this experiment result
tryAsking.zh: 对这个实验结果做统计分析

description.en: Write SQL, explore datasets, validate analysis, create visualizations, build dashboards, and generate statistical insights.
description.zh: 用于编写 SQL、探索数据集、验证分析、创建可视化、构建仪表盘和生成统计洞察。

description.en: Package an escalation for engineering, product, or leadership with full context. Use when a bug needs engineering attention beyond normal support, multiple customers report the same issue, a customer is threatening to churn, or an issue has sat unresolved past its SLA.
description.zh: 整理提交给工程、产品或管理层的问题升级材料，并补充完整背景信息。适用于缺陷超出常规支持范围、多个客户反馈同一问题、客户有流失风险，或问题超过 SLA 仍未解决的场景。

description.en: Multi-source research on a customer question or topic with source attribution. Use when a customer asks something you need to look up, investigating whether a bug has been reported before, checking what was previously told to a specific account, or gathering background before drafting a response.
description.zh: 基于多个来源调研客户问题或相关主题，并标注信息来源。适用于客户提出需要查证的问题、确认某个缺陷是否曾被反馈、查看过去对某个客户的回复记录，或在起草回复前补充背景信息。

description.en: Draft a professional customer-facing response tailored to the situation and relationship. Use when answering a product question, responding to an escalation or outage, delivering bad news like a delay or won't-fix, declining a feature request, or replying to a billing issue.
description.zh: 根据具体情况和客户关系，起草专业的客户回复。适用于回答产品问题、回应升级事项或故障、告知延期或不予修复等坏消息、拒绝功能需求，或回复账单相关问题。

description.en: Draft a knowledge base article from a resolved issue or common question. Use when a ticket resolution is worth documenting for self-service, the same question keeps coming up, a workaround needs to be published, or a known issue should be communicated to customers.
description.zh: 根据已解决的问题或高频问题起草知识库文章。适用于将工单解决方案沉淀为自助文档、整理反复出现的问题、发布临时解决方案，或向客户说明已知问题。

description.en: Triage and prioritize a support ticket or customer issue. Use when a new ticket comes in and needs categorization, assigning P1-P4 priority, deciding which team should handle it, or checking whether it's a duplicate or known issue before routing.
description.zh: 分析并分派支持工单或客户问题。适用于新工单进入后进行分类、评估 P1-P4 优先级、判断应由哪个团队处理，或在流转前确认是否为重复问题或已知问题。

tryAsking.en: Triage this customer ticket and suggest priority
tryAsking.zh: 分析这个客户工单，并建议处理优先级

tryAsking.en: Draft a customer-facing response for this issue
tryAsking.zh: 为这个问题起草一份客户回复

tryAsking.en: Package this bug report as an engineering escalation
tryAsking.zh: 将这个缺陷报告整理成提交给工程团队的升级材料

tryAsking.en: Research this customer before I respond
tryAsking.zh: 在我回复前，先整理这个客户的背景信息

tryAsking.en: Turn this resolved issue into a knowledge base article
tryAsking.zh: 将这个已解决的问题整理成知识库文章

tryAsking.en: Identify the root cause themes across these tickets
tryAsking.zh: 归纳这些工单中的主要根因类型

description.en: Triage tickets, research customer context, draft responses, package escalations, and create knowledge base articles.
description.zh: 辅助支持团队处理工单，包括判断优先级、了解客户背景、起草客户回复、整理问题升级材料，并沉淀为知识库文章。

description.en: Generate contextual briefings for legal work — daily summary, topic research, or incident response. Use when starting your day and need a scan of legal-relevant items across email, calendar, and contracts, when researching a specific legal question across internal sources, or when a developing situation (data breach, litigation threat, regulatory inquiry) needs rapid context.
description.zh: 为法务工作生成带上下文的简报，包括每日摘要、专题调研和事件响应。适用于一天开始时快速查看邮件、日历和合同中的法务相关事项，针对具体法律问题检索内部资料，或在数据泄露、诉讼威胁、监管问询等突发情况中快速梳理背景信息。

description.en: Run a compliance check on a proposed action, product feature, or business initiative, surfacing applicable regulations, required approvals, and risk areas. Use when launching a feature that touches personal data, when marketing or product proposes something with regulatory implications, or when you need to know which approvals and jurisdictional requirements apply before proceeding.
description.zh: 对拟开展的行动、产品功能或业务举措进行合规检查，梳理适用法规、所需审批和潜在风险点。适用于上线涉及个人数据的功能、市场或产品提出可能涉及监管要求的方案，或在推进前确认适用审批和不同地区合规要求的场景。

description.en: Generate a response to a common legal inquiry using configured templates, with built-in escalation checks for situations that shouldn't use a templated reply. Use when responding to data subject requests, litigation hold notices, vendor legal questions, NDA requests from business teams, or subpoenas.
description.zh: 基于已配置的模板生成常见法务咨询回复，并内置升级判断，识别不适合使用模板回复的情况。适用于回复数据主体请求、诉讼留存通知、供应商法务问题、业务团队的 NDA 请求或传票相关事项。

description.en: Assess and classify legal risks using a severity-by-likelihood framework with escalation criteria. Use when evaluating contract risk, assessing deal exposure, classifying issues by severity, or determining whether a matter needs senior counsel or outside legal review.
description.zh: 基于“严重程度 × 发生可能性”的框架评估并分类法律风险，同时给出升级处理标准。适用于评估合同风险、判断交易风险敞口、按严重程度划分问题等级，或确认事项是否需要高级法务或外部律师审查。

description.en: Prepare structured briefings for meetings with legal relevance and track resulting action items. Use when preparing for contract negotiations, board meetings, compliance reviews, or any meeting where legal context, background research, or action tracking is needed.
description.zh: 为涉及法务事项的会议准备结构化简报，并跟踪会议产生的行动项。适用于合同谈判、董事会会议、合规审查，或任何需要法律背景、前期资料调研和行动项跟进的会议。

description.en: Review a contract against your organization's negotiation playbook — flag deviations, generate redlines, provide business impact analysis. Use when reviewing vendor or customer agreements, when you need clause-by-clause analysis against standard positions, or when preparing a negotiation strategy with prioritized redlines and fallback positions.
description.zh: 按照组织的谈判指引审查合同，标出偏离标准立场的条款，生成修订建议，并分析业务影响。适用于审查供应商或客户协议、逐条对照标准条款进行分析，或制定包含优先修订项和可接受底线的谈判策略。

description.en: Prepare and route a document for e-signature — run a pre-signature checklist, configure signing order, and send for execution. Use when a contract is finalized and ready to sign, when verifying entity names, exhibits, and signature blocks before sending, or when setting up an envelope with sequential or parallel signers.
description.zh: 准备并流转待电子签署的文件，包括执行签署前检查清单、配置签署顺序并发起签署。适用于合同已定稿并准备签署、发送前核对主体名称、附件和签署栏，或设置顺序签署/并行签署流程的场景。

description.en: Rapidly triage an incoming NDA and classify it as GREEN (standard approval), YELLOW (counsel review), or RED (full legal review). Use when a new NDA arrives from sales or business development, when screening for embedded non-solicits, non-competes, or missing carveouts, or when deciding whether an NDA can be signed under standard delegation.
description.zh: 快速初审收到的 NDA，并按 GREEN（标准审批）、YELLOW（法务审查）或 RED（完整法律审查）进行分类。适用于销售或业务拓展团队收到新的 NDA、筛查其中是否包含禁止招揽、竞业限制或缺失例外条款，或判断 NDA 是否可在标准授权范围内签署的场景。

description.en: Check the status of existing agreements with a vendor across all connected systems — CLM, CRM, email, and document storage — with gap analysis and upcoming deadlines. Use when onboarding or renewing a vendor, when you need a consolidated view of what's signed and what's missing (MSA, DPA, SOW), or when checking for approaching expirations and surviving obligations.
description.zh: 跨已连接系统检查某个供应商的现有协议状态，包括 CLM、CRM、邮件和文档存储，并输出缺口分析和即将到期事项。适用于供应商准入或续约、汇总已签署和缺失的协议文件（如 MSA、DPA、SOW），或检查临近到期协议及合同终止后仍持续有效的义务。

tryAsking.en: Review this contract and flag material risks
tryAsking.zh: 审查这份合同，并标出重大风险点

tryAsking.en: Triage this NDA against our fallback positions
tryAsking.zh: 根据我方可接受底线，快速审查这份 NDA

tryAsking.en: Prepare a legal briefing for this meeting
tryAsking.zh: 为这次会议准备法务简报

tryAsking.en: Check this policy against compliance requirements
tryAsking.zh: 根据合规要求检查这项政策

tryAsking.en: Draft a templated legal response for this request
tryAsking.zh: 为这个请求起草一份标准化法务回复

tryAsking.en: Assess legal risk and recommend escalation level
tryAsking.zh: 评估法律风险，并建议是否需要升级处理

description.en: Assist in-house legal teams with contract review, NDA triage, compliance checks, risk assessment, legal briefs, and templated responses.
description.zh: 辅助企业法务团队完成合同审查、NDA 初审与风险判断、合规检查、风险评估、法律意见整理，以及标准化回复起草。

description.en: Convert laboratory instrument output files (PDF, CSV, Excel, TXT) to Allotrope Simple Model (ASM) JSON format or flattened 2D CSV. Use this skill when scientists need to standardize instrument data for LIMS systems, data lakes, or downstream analysis. Supports auto-detection of instrument types. Outputs include full ASM JSON, flattened CSV for easy import, and exportable Python code for data engineers. Common triggers include converting instrument files, standardizing lab data, preparing data for upload to LIMS/ELN systems, or generating parser code for production pipelines.
description.zh: 将实验室仪器输出文件（PDF、CSV、Excel、TXT）转换为 Allotrope 简单模型（ASM）JSON 格式或扁平化的二维 CSV。当科学家需要为 LIMS 系统、数据湖或下游分析标准化仪器数据时使用此技能。支持自动检测仪器类型。输出包括完整的 ASM JSON、易于导入的扁平化 CSV 以及供数据工程师导出的 Python 代码。常见触发条件包括转换仪器文件、标准化实验室数据、准备将数据上传至 LIMS/ELN 系统，或为生产管道生成解析器代码。

description.en: Run nf-core bioinformatics pipelines (rnaseq, sarek, atacseq) on sequencing data. Use when analyzing RNA-seq, WGS/WES, or ATAC-seq data—either local FASTQs or public datasets from GEO/SRA. Triggers on nf-core, Nextflow, FASTQ analysis, variant calling, gene expression, differential expression, GEO reanalysis, GSE/GSM/SRR accessions, or samplesheet creation.
description.zh: 对测序数据运行 nf-core 生物信息学流程（rnaseq、sarek、atacseq）。在分析 RNA-seq、WGS/WES 或 ATAC-seq 数据时使用——无论是本地 FASTQ 还是来自 GEO/SRA 的公开数据集。在提到 nf-core、Nextflow、FASTQ 分析、变异检测、基因表达、差异表达、GEO 重新分析、GSE/GSM/SRR 登记号或样本表创建时触发。

description.en: This skill should be used when scientists need help with research problem selection, project ideation, troubleshooting stuck projects, or strategic scientific decisions. Use this skill when users ask to pitch a new research idea, work through a project problem, evaluate project risks, plan research strategy, navigate decision trees, or get help choosing what scientific problem to work on. Typical requests include "I have an idea for a project", "I'm stuck on my research", "help me evaluate this project", "what should I work on", or "I need strategic advice about my research".
description.zh: 当科学家在研究问题选择、项目构思、排查卡点项目或战略性科学决策方面需要帮助时，应使用此技能。当用户要求提出新的研究想法、解决项目问题、评估项目风险、规划研究策略、浏览决策树或需要帮助选择要研究的科学问题时使用。典型请求包括“我有一个项目的想法”、“我的研究卡住了”、“帮我评估这个项目”、“我应该研究什么”或“我需要关于我研究的战略建议”。

description.en: Deep learning for single-cell analysis using scvi-tools. This skill should be used when users need (1) data integration and batch correction with scVI/scANVI, (2) ATAC-seq analysis with PeakVI, (3) CITE-seq multi-modal analysis with totalVI, (4) multiome RNA+ATAC analysis with MultiVI, (5) spatial transcriptomics deconvolution with DestVI, (6) label transfer and reference mapping with scANVI/scArches, (7) RNA velocity with veloVI, or (8) any deep learning-based single-cell method. Triggers include mentions of scVI, scANVI, totalVI, PeakVI, MultiVI, DestVI, veloVI, sysVI, scArches, variational autoencoder, VAE, batch correction, data integration, multi-modal, CITE-seq, multiome, reference mapping, latent space.
description.zh: 使用 scvi-tools 进行单细胞分析的深度学习。当用户需要 (1) 使用 scVI/scANVI 进行数据整合和批次校正，(2) 使用 PeakVI 进行 ATAC-seq 分析，(3) 使用 totalVI 进行 CITE-seq 多组学分析，(4) 使用 MultiVI 进行 RNA+ATAC 多组学分析，(5) 使用 DestVI 进行空间转录组解卷积，(6) 使用 scANVI/scArches 进行标签迁移和参考映射，(7) 使用 veloVI 进行 RNA 速率分析，或 (8) 任何基于深度学习的单细胞方法时，应使用此技能。触发词包括提及 scVI、scANVI、totalVI、PeakVI、MultiVI、DestVI、veloVI、sysVI、scArches、变分自编码器、VAE、批次校正、数据整合、多模态、CITE-seq、多组学、参考映射、潜在空间。

description.en: Performs quality control on single-cell RNA-seq data (.h5ad or .h5 files) using scverse best practices with MAD-based filtering and comprehensive visualizations. Use when users request QC analysis, filtering low-quality cells, assessing data quality, or following scverse/scanpy best practices for single-cell analysis.
description.zh: 使用 scverse 的最佳实践，通过基于 MAD 的过滤和全面的可视化，对单细胞 RNA-seq 数据（.h5ad 或 .h5 文件）执行质量控制。当用户请求 QC 分析、过滤低质量细胞、评估数据质量或遵循单细胞分析的 scverse/scanpy 最佳实践时使用。

description.en: Set up your bio-research environment and explore available tools. Use when first getting oriented with the plugin, checking which literature, drug-discovery, or visualization MCP servers are connected, or surveying available analysis skills before starting a new project.
description.zh: 设置您的生物研究环境并探索可用工具。在首次熟悉插件、检查连接了哪些文献、药物发现或可视化 MCP 服务器，或在开始新项目之前调查可用分析技能时使用。

tryAsking.en: Find relevant literature for this target hypothesis
tryAsking.zh: 为这个靶点假设查找相关文献

tryAsking.en: Design a single-cell RNA quality control workflow
tryAsking.zh: 设计单细胞 RNA 质控流程

tryAsking.en: Help prioritize these scientific research problems
tryAsking.zh: 帮助排列这些科学研究问题的优先级

tryAsking.en: Build a Nextflow workflow for this analysis
tryAsking.zh: 为这项分析构建 Nextflow 工作流

tryAsking.en: Convert this instrument data into Allotrope format
tryAsking.zh: 将这份仪器数据转换为 Allotrope 格式

tryAsking.en: Plan an scvi-tools analysis for this dataset
tryAsking.zh: 为这个数据集规划 scvi-tools 分析

description.en: Support life sciences research workflows including literature search, genomics analysis, target prioritization, and scientific analysis.
description.zh: 支持生命科学研究流程，包括文献检索、基因组分析、靶点优先级排序和科学分析。

description.en: Review content against your brand voice, style guide, and messaging pillars, flagging deviations by severity with specific before/after fixes. Use when checking a draft before it ships, when auditing copy for voice consistency and terminology, or when screening for unsubstantiated claims, missing disclaimers, and other legal flags.
description.zh: 对照您的品牌调性、风格指南和核心信息支柱审查内容，按严重程度标记偏差，并提供具体的修改前后建议。适用于在发布前审查草稿、审计文案的语调一致性和术语，或筛查无根据的声明、遗漏的免责声明及其他法律风险。

description.en: Generate a full campaign brief with objectives, audience, messaging, channel strategy, content calendar, and success metrics. Use when planning a product launch, lead-gen push, or awareness campaign, when you need a week-by-week content calendar with dependencies, or when translating a marketing goal into a structured, executable plan.
description.zh: 生成完整的营销活动简报，涵盖目标、受众、核心信息、渠道策略、内容日历和成功指标。适用于规划产品发布、线索生成或品牌认知活动，需要包含依赖关系的逐周内容日历，或将营销目标转化为结构化可执行计划时使用。

tryAsking.en: Review this post for brand voice alignment
tryAsking.zh: 审查这篇推文是否符合品牌调性

tryAsking.en: Create a campaign plan for our new product launch
tryAsking.zh: 为我们的新产品发布创建营销活动计划

description.en: Focus on brand review, campaign planning, and audience growth.
description.zh: 专注于品牌审查、活动规划和受众增长。

description.en: Get structured design feedback on usability, hierarchy, and consistency. Trigger with "review this design", "critique this mockup", "what do you think of this screen?", or when sharing a Figma link or screenshot for feedback at any stage from exploration to final polish.
description.zh: 从可用性、层级 and 一致性方面获取结构化的设计反馈。当提到“审查这个设计”、“点评这个模型”、“你觉得这个界面怎么样？”，或者在从探索到最终打磨的任何阶段分享 Figma 链接或截图以获取反馈时触发。

description.en: Write or review UX copy — microcopy, error messages, empty states, CTAs. Trigger with "write copy for", "what should this button say?", "review this error message", or when naming a CTA, wording a confirmation dialog, filling an empty state, or writing onboarding text.
description.zh: 撰写或审查 UX 文案——微文案、错误提示、空状态、CTA。当提到“为...写文案”、“这个按钮应该怎么写？”、“审查这个错误提示”，或者在为 CTA 命名、斟酌确认弹窗措辞、填充空状态或撰写引导文本时触发。

tryAsking.en: Give feedback on this banner design
tryAsking.zh: 对这个横幅设计给出反馈

tryAsking.en: Help write copy for our image placeholders
tryAsking.zh: 帮我们的图片占位符撰写文案

description.en: Generate, edit, and critique image assets and designs.
description.zh: 用于生成、编辑和点评图像资产及设计。
